perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan over a striped top, stands in the freezer aisle of a Costco warehouse, gesturing toward the ice cream section. (2) Close-up shots feature boxes of Niseko Yuzu Yogurt Ice Cream and a large tub of the yellow-swirled white ice cream. (3) Two women (one in a blue top, one in a floral dress and pink beret) sit at a marble-topped table, using a metal scoop to serve the ice cream into pink bowls and tasting it while looking at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo pop/vlog-style BGM starts. A young woman's voice is heard narrating with an excited and clear tone. (2) The sound of a freezer door opening and closing is audible. (3) The audio transitions to a conversational dialogue between two females. They speak in a friendly, review-oriented manner, discussing the flavor profile. The metallic clicking and scraping sounds of an ice cream scoop are heard distinctly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Hook Text: 'Threads 上爆紅' (Viral on Threads) and '柚香優格冰淇淋' (Yuzu Yogurt Ice Cream) are displayed in large, colorful fonts. (3) Decorative Text: Captions like '乳酸菌口味的冰淇淋' (Lactic acid bacteria flavor ice cream), '非常的綿密' (Very creamy), and '性價比還蠻高的' (High cost-performance ratio) appear to emphasize the review points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Close-up product shots -> In-depth tasting and review at home.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female at the store (main creator), 2 females at the table during the tasting (including the creator).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a white cardigan; the second woman wears a floral dress and a pink beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse freezer section followed by a domestic interior featuring a marble table and plush toys in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and fluorescent supermarket lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer review of a specific food product (Niseko Yuzu Yogurt Ice Cream) found at Costco. It aims to validate a social media trend ('Threads viral') by providing a first-hand taste test and evaluating the flavor, texture, and value for money.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, brand name prominently displayed, and positive evaluation of taste and value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety show style captions and a casual dialogue-based review style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages current social media trends (Threads) to attract viewers looking for trending food recommendations.
